metadata.description: OpenClaw v2.2 — write_files puts a real bash script on disk with proper YAML inline content, runcmd executes it with explicit /bin/bash. Avoids the dash-shell-default issue that broke v2.0.
Anthropic-supported region (UAE North, West Europe, US, etc).

firstSteps.value: Wait ~4 min for bootstrap. Visit openClawUrl. SSH and run: grep token ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json to get the gateway token.
